title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. elfstrandii
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. elfstrandii, also known as Elfstrand's hawkweed, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune system function. In herbal preparations, Elfstrand's hawkweed is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
